title: selaginella andrewsii
intro: Selaginella andrewsii, also known as Andrews' spikemoss, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Selaginella andrewsii can be prepared into herbal remedies through teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
